title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at ICAT - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at ICAT - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
ICAT, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Curriculum Developer for our Nashik operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About ICAT:
ICAT is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICAT!
